# Changelog

## 1.0.42 — 2026-04-25

- Added support for Sonnet 4.6.
- Improved permission prompts for MCP tools.
- Fixed a regression in the commit-message guard.

## 1.0.41 — 2026-04-22

- Fixed bug where `claude --version` returned an old version string.

## 1.0.40 — 2026-04-18

- Initial v1 release of memory subsystem.
